---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the problem or use case. "As a … I want … so that …" is welcome.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

**Additional context**
Anything else — this may map to an item in [`docs/backlog.md`](../../docs/backlog.md).
